response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack required. They have also demonstrated experience with AI agent development and various other technologies relevant to the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven ability to work with multiple programming languages and technologies
Experience with AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: Some experience is in roles not directly labeled as 'Full Stack Engineer'
Less direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest, though familiar with similar technologies
Some projects and roles seem unrelated to the enterprise engineering context
